items.title: Pentagon signs classified AI agreements with 8 companies, excludes Anthropic
Microsoft Agent 365 reaches general availability at $15/user/month
items.limitations_found: manual agent registration; no auto-discovery; governance controls dispersed across separate Microsoft tools

items.title: Hangzhou court: AI adoption is a strategic choice, not an objective major change permitting dismissal
items.author_org: Caixin Global / Hangzhou Intermediate People's Court (ruling: 2026-04-28)

items.title: IBM releases Granite 4.1 model family (3B/8B/30B) under Apache 2.0
items.comparison_claim: 8B instruct matches prior 32B MoE — vendor-claimed, no independent benchmark found

items.title: xAI releases Grok 4.3 with 37.5% lower input pricing and improved agentic scores
items.author_org: Artificial Analysis (independent; xAI blog was unreachable 403)

items.title: Alibaba Qwen releases Qwen-Scope: open sparse autoencoder suite for model interpretability and steering
items.models_covered: 14 SAE groups across 7 Qwen3/Qwen3.5 model variants

items.title: ChatGPT rolls out Advanced Account Security with passkeys and recovery keys
items.author_org: OpenAI (via release notes aggregator; openai.com/news returned 403)

items.title: OpenAI Codex 0.128.0 adds persistent goal workflows and expanded plugin support
Safety Drift After Fine-Tuning: safety properties of LLMs are not stable across downstream adaptation
items.author_org: Emaan Bilal Khan, Amy Winecoff, Miranda Bogen, Dylan Hadfield-Menell
items.finding: fine-tuning induces large, heterogeneous, and often contradictory changes in measured safety

items.title: Claw-Eval-Live: leading AI agents succeed on only 66.7% of real-world workflow tasks
Moonshot AI open-sources FlashKDA CUDA kernels for Kimi Delta Attention
items.speedup_fixed_length: 1.72x over flash-linear-attention baseline on H20 (vendor benchmark)
items.note: speedup figures are vendor-measured on H20 GPUs; no independent replication found

limitations: Sources unreachable: xAI blog (x.ai/news — 403), OpenAI News (openai.com/news — 403), grok.com/release-notes (403). OpenAI and Grok items relied on third-party aggregators.
Login-walled content not covered: X timeline, LinkedIn, Discord, IG.
mcp-ecosystem: No new MCP specification or reference implementation releases found in window. 2026 MCP roadmap update was from March 2026.
SEA/Indonesia coverage: No in-window announcements from Indonesian or SEA AI organizations found.
Items 4-11 span April 29-30, 2026 — up to 72h before publication. Strict 24h window yielded only 3 items; expanded to include weekend context items still fresh as of May 1.
arXiv items (Safety Drift, Claw-Eval-Live) are preprints — not yet peer-reviewed. Findings should be treated as preliminary.
FlashKDA speedup figures (1.72x-2.22x) are vendor-measured on H20 GPUs; no independent replication found.
IBM Granite 4.1 performance comparison vs prior 32B MoE is vendor-claimed; no independent benchmark found.
